Biography

Rooted in
performance,
built in the studio.

Hylton Chilchik is a singer, songwriter, and producer with deep roots in both the performance and recording industries. His album with 21st Century Fox Originals produced five songs that climbed into the Top 10 on national radio stations.

One of the defining chapters of his career was five years as a member of Stimela — South Africa's celebrated soul and jazz-fusion band. Together they toured the entire Southern African region, performing for audiences of up to 60,000 people in outdoor stadiums.

Stimela's particular brand of jazz-fusion earned the band numerous gold and platinum albums. The band's legacy culminated in two of its members performing on the Paul Simon Graceland album and its historic world tour.
